name: Dracotail Faimena
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星辰砲手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドラゴンテイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ファイメナ
desc: During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; Fusion Summon 1 Dragon or Spellcaster Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. If this card is sent to the GY as material for a Fusion Summon: You can Set 1 "Dracotail" Spell/Trap from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Dracotail Faimena" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; Fusion Summon 1 Dragon or Spellcaster Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. If this card is sent to the GY as material for a Fusion Summon: You can Set 1 "Dracotail" Spell/Trap from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Dracotail Faimena" once per turn.
eff: During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; Fusion Summon 1 Dragon or Spellcaster Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
